The quarterly file updates are full replacement files and contain data from the launch of each model to the current quarter. Note: Participating entities, providers and beneficiaries may frequently change due to time lags in updates by model participants to their provider lists and/or to changes in beneficiary attribution. As such, these files should not be considered fully complete or final until approximately 6-12 months after a model has
